name: Fasson Employees
description_short: Fasson Employees' Federal Credit Union is a member-owned cooperative serving Avery Dennison employees and their families since 1959, offering loans, savings accounts, and financial services.
description_long:
Fasson Employees' Federal Credit Union was established in 1959 as a financial cooperative specifically created to serve employees of Avery Dennison Corporation and their family members. As a not-for-profit, member-owned organization, it operates on cooperative principles where members are both customers and shareholders, with each member holding equal ownership stakes in the institution.

The credit union offers a range of financial products including member loans, savings accounts, club accounts, vehicle financing (new and used cars, motorcycles, boats, RVs, and ATVs), and financial calculators to help members plan their finances. Members earn dividends on their savings rather than traditional interest, and can access loans at competitive rates. The organization provides payroll deduction options for membership and loan payments, simplifying account management for working members.

Fasson stands out through its employee affinity model—membership is restricted to Avery Dennison employees and their families, creating a tight-knit member base with shared employment circumstances. This focus allows them to understand their members' specific financial needs and offer tailored products. The credit union is democratically governed by a volunteer board of directors elected from the membership, ensuring member voices shape organizational decisions. Their current spring promotion offers reduced rates on vehicle financing (as low as 3.50% for new vehicles) with a minimum TransUnion credit score requirement of 600.

As a federally chartered credit union (NCUA-insured), Fasson provides members with the safety and security typical of regulated financial institutions. However, membership restrictions mean this institution is not accessible to the general public—only Avery Dennison employees qualify. The limited lobby hours (8 a.m. to 3 p.m. EST, Monday-Friday only) and single physical location in Painesville, Ohio may present accessibility challenges for members outside the immediate area.
services: New vehicle financing (currently as low as 3.50% APR)
Used vehicle financing (currently as low as 4.50% APR)
Motorcycle, boat, RV, and ATV financing (currently as low as 5.25% APR)
Payroll deduction for loan payments and membership dues
Financial calculators for loan and savings planning
Membership applications for eligible Avery Dennison employees and families
pros: Member-owned cooperative structure means profits are returned to members as dividends rather than paid to external shareholders
Competitive vehicle loan rates with current promotion offering new car financing as low as 3.50% APR
Payroll deduction options available for loan and membership payments, simplifying account management
NCUA-insured deposits provide federal protection for member savings
Democratic governance with volunteer board elected from membership ensures member voices shape decisions
Low credit score minimum of 600 TransUnion score to qualify for promotional rates
Established since 1959 with long-term stability and institutional knowledge of member needs
cons: Membership is restricted to Avery Dennison employees and their families only—not open to general public
Single physical location in Painesville, Ohio limits accessibility for members in other areas
Very limited lobby hours (8 a.m. to 3 p.m. EST, Monday-Friday only) with no weekend service
Website contains spelling errors and appears dated, suggesting limited digital modernization
No mention of online banking, mobile app, or remote account opening capabilities despite modern expectations
best_for: Current Avery Dennison employees seeking vehicle financing with competitive rates and employer payroll integration
Avery Dennison employee families wanting a cooperative savings and lending relationship with dividend returns
Members in the Painesville, Ohio area with predictable business hours (8 a.m. to 3 p.m. EST Monday-Friday)
Borrowers with TransUnion credit scores of 600+ seeking promotional vehicle loan rates
diagnosis: Fasson Employees' Federal Credit Union is best for current or retired Avery Dennison employees and their immediate family members seeking member-owned financial services with competitive vehicle loan rates and dividend-earning savings. The critical caveat is that membership is strictly limited to the Avery Dennison employee population—this credit union is inaccessible to the general public.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
